heading: Implementation of plan
label: 1142 Implementation of plan
notes: Amendments1984—, substituted “Implementation” for “Execution” in section catchline.Pub. L. 98–353, § 514(a)Subsec. (a). , struck out the comma after “shall carry out the plan”.Pub. L. 98–353, § 514(c)Subsec. (b). , inserted “a” after “by”.Pub. L. 98–353, § 514(d)

Effective Date of 1984 AmendmentAmendment by effective with respect to cases filed 90 days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 98–353section 552(a) of Pub. L. 98–353section 101 of this titleJuly 10, 1984
amendments: Amendments1984—, substituted “Implementation” for “Execution” in section catchline.Pub. L. 98–353, § 514(a)Subsec. (a). , struck out the comma after “shall carry out the plan”.Pub. L. 98–353, § 514(c)Subsec. (b). , inserted “a” after “by”.Pub. L. 98–353, § 514(d)

Effective Date of 1984 AmendmentAmendment by effective with respect to cases filed 90 days after , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 98–353section 552(a) of Pub. L. 98–353section 101 of this titleJuly 10, 1984

children.label: a
children.text: Notwithstanding any otherwise applicable nonbankruptcy law, rule, or regulation relating to financial condition, the debtor and any entity organized or to be organized for the purpose of carrying out the plan shall carry out the plan and shall comply with any orders of the court.

children.label: b
children.text: The court may direct the debtor and any other necessary party to execute or deliver or to join in the execution or delivery of any instrument required to effect a transfer of property dealt with by a confirmed plan, and to perform any other act, including the satisfaction of any lien, that is necessary for the consummation of the plan.
